name: Gingerbread Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the machine according to the custom settings.
2. LEMON ICING: In a small mixing bowl, stir together 1/2 cup sifted powdered sugar, 1/4 teaspoon vanilla, 1 tablespoon lemon juice, and enough milk (1-3 tablespoons) to achieve an icing consistency that can be drizzled.
(Note: The original recipe included the term "put ingredients in machine according to custom," which is unclear. I assumed this means following the settings provided by the specific baking machine or appliance being used.)
